title: Endami
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Endami''' was the owner of the [[Galaxy Grill]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and friend of [[Astri Oddo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
